skills.name: Compliance
notes: Converted legacy compliance content checks into central Compliance / Policy Guard operator.

Built core checks: quick-check, full-check, popia-check, hpcsa-check, patient-data-check, marketing-check, document-check.
Built workflow guards: ocr-check, drive-sharing-check, docs-check, calendar-check, crm-check.
Built policy maintenance safeguards: update-check, refresh-plan, policy-diff, blocked-policy-update.
Built audit and safety blocks: audit, blocked-disclosure, blocked-clinical-decision, blocked-bulk-export, blocked-hidden-capture.
Tested reports, safety blocks, no secret exposure, no policy-rule changes, no deletion, and Hub Adapter metadata.
Compliance Full Operator v1 complete with Hub Adapter pending.

PayFast is future payment-event source.

Live Xero/PayFast credentials remain future configuration items.
